description: Delayed vendor payment due to incomplete approval workflow causing reconciliation backlog.
root_cause: Approval workflow gaps prevented payment processing.

description: Manual journal entries were posted without dual control checks leading to accounting discrepancies.
root_cause: Missing segregation of duties in journal entry process.

description: Customer onboarding data mismatch caused failed KYC validation and process delays.
root_cause: Inconsistent customer data across intake forms.

description: System outage during batch clearing prevented transaction reconciliation for several hours.
root_cause: Legacy platform failure during high-volume batch processing.

description: Control failure in segregation of duties allowed a single employee to both approve and execute payments.
root_cause: Process design did not enforce dual authorization.

description: Reconciliation issue uncovered a missing invoice for high-value cross-border settlement.
root_cause: Data quality gap in invoice ingestion.

description: Unstructured risk issue report lacked urgency and did not include impact or remediation actions.
root_cause: Poor reporting template and review discipline.

description: Inconsistent authorization levels led to unauthorized access to trade execution systems.
root_cause: Incorrect role assignment in access management.

description: Payment delay due to missing supporting documents in the treasury approval chain.
Exception handling gap in the reconciliation engine resulted in duplicate posting of entries.
root_cause: Inadequate error handling in reconciliation routines.

description: Vendor master data error caused payments to be routed to the wrong account.
Incomplete incident report had poor clarity and did not specify affected business units.
root_cause: Lack of clear incident reporting standards.
